title: Monkey on the Marigold (Sitarsploitation genre - shot 10)
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Walked in with a crown of beads
Dust on my shoes, mango on my sleeve
You smiled like you knew my name
Then the whole room changed

Your bangles flashed in the heat
Your laugh kept time with my feet
I came for the noise, came for the thrill
Now I want you still

[Pre-Chorus]
Hold that glance
Don’t let go
Spin me round
Nice and slow

[Chorus]
Monkey on the marigold
(hey, hey)
Monkey on the marigold
(come on, now)
You pull me in, I lose control
Monkey on the marigold

[Verse 2]
Silver cups on a painted tray
Sweet smoke curling far away
You tapped your heel on the floor
I wanted more and more

My heart went clack in a thousand parts
You played me back with electric sparks
One little look, one little grin
And there I was again

[Pre-Chorus]
Hold that glance
Don’t let go
Spin me round
Nice and slow

[Chorus]
Monkey on the marigold
(hey, hey)
Monkey on the marigold
(come on, now)
You pull me in, I lose control
Monkey on the marigold

[Bridge]
[Tabla break]
If I fall, let me fall your way
If I burn, let it be today
One more step, one more sway
Stay with me, stay with me

[Final Chorus]
Monkey on the marigold
(hey, hey)
Monkey on the marigold
(come on, now)
You pull me in, I lose control
Monkey on the marigold

Monkey on the marigold
(hey, hey)
Monkey on the marigold
(come on, now)
You pull me in, I lose control
Monkey on the marigold
